creator: rehsack@web.de
text:
Scott Long wrote:
> Thanks for the excellent debugging info and patch.  This should be a 
> problem for all versions of FreeBSD, not just 7.0, and it probably 
> explains some weird behavior that happens sometimes when the iir driver 
> is in use.

Hi Scott,

are there any plans to MFC this patch into 7.0-RELEASE? Wouldn't it be
"stupid" if new installations of 7.0 machines with not most recent Intel
RAID controllers (and ICP Vortex ones) will still have the "weird behavior"?

> Scott

/Jens
